title: Creamy Beef Burrito
description: A delicious and filling burrito filled with seasoned beef, creamy sauce, and melted cheese.
instructions: Brown the beef in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the onion and garlic to the skillet and cook until the onion is translucent.
Stir in the cumin and cook for 1 minute.
Add the cream to the skillet and stir to combine.
Reduce heat to low and simmer for 5 minutes.
Warm the tortillas by wrapping them in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20-30 seconds.
Spoon the beef mixture onto a tortilla and top with shredded cheese.
Fold the bottom edge of the tortilla up over the filling, then fold in the sides and roll the burrito up tightly.
